tasks.label: Build ISO (Podman)
args:
set -euo pipefail
sudo podman run --rm -it --privileged -v "$PWD:/work" -w /work archlinux:latest bash -lc '
set -euo pipefail
pacman-key --init
pacman-key --populate archlinux
pacman -Sy --noconfirm archlinux-keyring
pacman -Syu --noconfirm --disable-download-timeout
pacman -S --noconfirm archiso grub dosfstools mtools efibootmgr
rm -rf /work/out-work
rm -f /work/out-iso/*.iso
mkdir -p /work/out-iso
mkarchiso -m iso -v -w /work/out-work -o /work/out-iso /work/oxsystemsos
'

tasks.label: Build ISO (Podman Fast Cached)
args:
set -euo pipefail
sudo podman run --rm -it --privileged -v "$PWD:/work" -w /work archlinux:latest bash -lc '
set -euo pipefail
pacman-key --init
pacman-key --populate archlinux
pacman -Sy --noconfirm --disable-download-timeout archlinux-keyring
pacman -S --noconfirm --needed --disable-download-timeout archiso grub dosfstools mtools efibootmgr
mkdir -p /work/out-work /work/out-iso
rm -f /work/out-iso/*.iso
mkarchiso -m iso -v -w /work/out-work -o /work/out-iso /work/oxsystemsos
'

tasks.label: Run QEMU (latest ISO)
args:
set -euo pipefail
ISO=$(ls -1t out-iso/oxsystemsos-*.iso 2>/dev/null | head -n1 || true)
if [ -z "${ISO}" ]; then
  echo "Nenhum ISO encontrado em out-iso/. Rode Build ISO primeiro."
  exit 1
fi
echo "Usando ISO: ${ISO}"
qemu-system-x86_64 -m 2048 -enable-kvm -cdrom "${ISO}" -nic user,model=virtio-net-pci,hostfwd=tcp::2222-:22

tasks.label: Check Branding (no Arch Linux)
args:
set -euo pipefail
FILES=(
  oxsystemsos/syslinux/syslinux.cfg
  oxsystemsos/syslinux/syslinux-linux.cfg
  oxsystemsos/grub/grub.cfg
  oxsystemsos/grub/loopback.cfg
  oxsystemsos/efiboot/loader/loader.conf
  oxsystemsos/efiboot/loader/entries/*.conf
  oxsystemsos/airootfs/etc/issue
  oxsystemsos/airootfs/etc/issue.net
  oxsystemsos/airootfs/etc/os-release
  oxsystemsos/airootfs/etc/hostname
  oxsystemsos/airootfs/etc/motd
)
echo "Verificando strings proibidas..."
if rg -n "Arch Linux" ${FILES[@]}; then
  echo "Falha: ainda existe 'Arch Linux' nos arquivos acima."
  exit 1
fi
echo "OK: sem 'Arch Linux' nos arquivos de branding."
